translations.vi: Đây là một thảm họa hoàn toàn.
translations.hi: यह पूरी तरह से तबाही है.

tokens.explanation: Clitic subject pronoun introducing a copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicate nominal.
Indefinite article marking a singular noun phrase.
Predicate noun serving as the complement of the copula.
Attributive adjective modifying 'désastre'.

sentences.target: On a évité le désastre, juste à temps.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ a evite lə dezastʁ, ʒyst a tɑ̃/

translations.fr: On a évité le désastre, juste à temps.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ a evite lə dezastʁ, ʒyst a tɑ̃/
translations.en: We avoided the disaster, just in time.
translations.es: Evitamos el desastre justo a tiempo.
translations.de: Wir haben die Katastrophe gerade noch rechtzeitig vermieden.
translations.it: Abbiamo evitato il disastro proprio in tempo.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们及时避免了这场灾难。
translations.yue: 我哋及時避過咗個災難。
translations.ru: Мы избежали катастрофы как раз вовремя.
translations.pt: Evitamos o desastre bem a tempo.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đã tránh được thảm họa đúng lúc.
translations.nl: We hebben de ramp net op tijd vermeden.
translations.hi: हम समय रहते आपदा से बच गए.
translations.el: Αποφύγαμε την καταστροφή στο παρά πέντε.
translations.nb: Vi unngikk katastrofen i siste liten.
translations.id: Kami menghindari bencana tepat sebelum terlambat.
translations.sv: Vi undvek katastrofen i sista stund.
translations.ro: Am evitat dezastrul chiar la timp.
translations.cs: Katastrofě jsme se vyhnuli právě včas.
translations.da: Vi undgik katastrofen i sidste øjeblik.
translations.ja: ぎりぎりで惨事を避けた。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (informal 'we' in contemporary usage).
Auxiliary forming the passé composé.
Past participle; main lexical verb in the compound tense.
Definite article introducing the direct object.
Direct object of 'évité'.
Adverb; part of the idiom 'juste à temps' expressing narrowly timed action.
Preposition introducing the temporal noun 'temps'.
Head noun of the temporal prepositional phrase.

sentences.target: Ce déménagement est un désastre pour nous.
sentences.reading: /sə demenaʒmɑ̃ ɛ œ̃ dezastʁ puʁ nu/

translations.fr: Ce déménagement est un désastre pour nous.
translations.ipa: /sə demenaʒmɑ̃ ɛ œ̃ dezastʁ puʁ nu/
translations.en: This move is a disaster for us.
translations.es: Esta mudanza es un desastre para nosotros.
translations.de: Dieser Umzug ist eine Katastrophe für uns.
translations.it: Questo trasloco è un disastro per noi.
translations.zh-Hans: 这次搬家对我们来说是个灾难。
translations.yue: 今次搬屋對我哋嚟講係一場災難。
translations.pt: Esta mudança é um desastre para nós.
translations.tr: Bu taşınma bizim için bir felaket.
translations.vi: Việc chuyển nhà này là một thảm họa đối với chúng tôi.
translations.nl: Deze verhuizing is een ramp voor ons.
translations.hi: यह घर बदलना हमारे लिए एक तबाही है.
translations.pl: Ta przeprowadzka to dla nas katastrofa.
translations.el: Αυτή η μετακόμιση είναι καταστροφή για εμάς.
translations.nb: Denne flyttingen er en katastrofe for oss.
translations.id: Pindahan ini adalah bencana bagi kami.
translations.sv: Den här flytten är en katastrof för oss.
translations.ro: Mutarea asta este un dezastru pentru noi.
translations.cs: Tohle stěhování je pro nás katastroфа.
translations.da: Denne flytning er en katastrofe for os.
translations.ja: この引っ越しは私たちにとって災難だ。

tokens.explanation: Demonstrative determiner specifying the noun 'déménagement'.
Head noun; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking subject and predicate.
Indefinite article introducing the predicate nominal.
Predicate noun complement of the copula.
Preposition introducing a beneficiary/affected-party phrase.
Stressed pronoun; object of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Ton plan ressemble à un désastre aujourd'hui.
sentences.reading: /tɔ̃ plɑ̃ ʁəsɑ̃bl a œ̃ dezastʁ oʒuʁdɥi/

translations.fr: Ton plan ressemble à un désastre aujourd'hui.
translations.ipa: /tɔ̃ plɑ̃ ʁəsɑ̃bl a œ̃ dezastʁ oʒuʁdɥi/
translations.en: Your plan looks like a disaster today.
translations.es: Tu plan parece un desastre hoy.
translations.de: Dein Plan sieht heute nach einer Katastrophe aus.
translations.it: Il tuo piano oggi sembra un disastro.
translations.zh-Hans: 你今天的计划看起来像场灾难。
translations.yue: 你今日個計劃睇落好似一場災難。
translations.ru: Твой план сегодня выглядит как катастрофа.
translations.pt: Seu plano hoje parece um desastre.
translations.he: התוכנית שלך היום נראית כמו אסון.
translations.vi: Kế hoạch của bạn hôm nay trông như một thảm họा.
translations.nl: Je plan ziet er vandaag uit als een ramp.
translations.uk: Твій план сьогодні виглядає як катастрофа.
translations.hi: तुम्हारी योजना आज एक तबाही जैसी लग रही है.
translations.pl: Twój plan dziś wygląda jak katastrofa.
translations.el: Το σχέδιό σου σήμερα μοιάζει με καταστροφή.
translations.nb: Planen din ser ut som en katastrofe i dag.
translations.id: Rencanamu hari ini terlihat seperti bencana.
translations.sv: Din plan ser ut som en katastroф i dag.
translations.ro: Planul tău azi arată ca un dezastru.
translations.cs: Tvůj plán dnes vypadá jako katastroфа.
translations.da: Din plan ligner en katastrofe i dag.
translations.ja: 今日は君の計画は災難みたいに見える。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner agreeing with masculine singular noun.
Head noun; subject of the clause.
Main verb; takes the preposition 'à' to introduce the comparison.
Preposition required by 'ressembler' to mark its complement.
Indefinite article introducing the complement noun.
Noun complement of 'à' after 'ressembler'.
Temporal adverb modifying the whole clause.
